subcodes.first_line: O Ha that precedeth Sin! The Greater Branch is present and maketh mention of thee. We beseech God that He may graciously aid thee in that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حاء قبل س غصن اکبر حاضر و بذکرت ناطق از حق میطلبیم تو را موید فرماید بر آنچه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement
